category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a command-line tool to manage cert-manager; official cert-manager documentation describes cmctl as managing cert-manager resources in a cluster.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cmctl; official cert-manager documentation uses cmctl for the command-line tool.
docs_sources: Official cert-manager documentation has a dedicated cmctl reference page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/cert-manager/cmctl, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it manages cert-manager; source_facts.homepage is cert-manager.io.
